name: Activity Feed
description: Chronological list of activity events with avatars, timestamps, and action descriptions. Used in dashboards and profile pages.

default.description: Chronological list of activity events with avatars, timestamps, and action descriptions. Used in dashboards and profile pages.

slots.header: Section title with _heading5 and optional filter/date-range controls
slots.feed: Timeline of activity items, each with Avatar, action Text, timestamp Badge, and Separator between entries
slots.load-more: Optional Button at bottom for pagination

notification-center.description: Notifications grouped by date with read/unread state and dismiss actions. Used for notification centers and alert panels.

slots.date-group: Date header separator grouping notifications by day
slots.notification: Row with unread indicator, icon, message, timestamp, and dismiss Button
slots.actions: Mark all read Button, filter controls

social.description: Social media-style feed with reactions, comment counts, and share buttons. Richer cards per entry for community and social features.

slots.post: Card with Avatar header, content body, and reaction/comment/share footer row
slots.reactions: Row of reaction Buttons with counts (like, comment, share)

minimal.description: Ultra-minimal activity list with just text and timestamp. No avatars, no badges, no cards. Maximum information density.

slots.entry: Single line with action text and right-aligned timestamp

code.imports:
import { tags } from 'decantr/tags';
import { css } from 'decantr/css';

grouped.description: Activity items grouped by entity or category with collapsible group headers. Used when activity spans multiple projects, repos, or categories.

slots.group-header: Collapsible header with entity name, count Badge, and expand/collapse toggle
slots.group-items: Activity items within the group, each with avatar, action text, and timestamp

slots.header: Section title with _heading5 and optional filter/date-range controls
slots.feed: Timeline of activity items, each with Avatar, action Text, timestamp Badge, and Separator between entries
slots.load-more: Optional Button at bottom for pagination
